<!-- dropbox: https://www.dropbox.com/preview/CbDD_Dienstordner/literatur/altes%20corpus/chunked/chunked/Band03-1_chunk001.pdf#page=25 -->
<!-- citation-page-top: Band03-1 p48 -->

<!-- header: ST. JOHANN NEPOMUK -->

<!-- header: ST. JOHANN NEPOMUK -->


[[File:Band03-1_chunk001_p025_img001.jpg|thumb|Nördliches Wandfresko W<sub>2</sub> Verehrung der Zungen-Reliquie des Johann von Nepomuk]]



[[File:Band03-1_chunk001_p025_img002.jpg|thumb]]
<!-- citation-page-bottom: Band03-1 p49 -->
